subtitle: Skin Health Tracking
description:
RadianceIQ is your personal skin health companion -- a clinically inspired tracking app that turns your daily skincare routine into measurable progress.

POWERED BY INTELLIGENT ANALYSIS
RadianceIQ combines advanced computer vision with dermatology-grade scoring frameworks (GAGS for acne, SCORAD for inflammation, VISIA-inspired metrics for sun damage) to give you objective, repeatable skin assessments. No guesswork, no subjective before-and-afters -- just data.

DAILY TRACKING THAT TAKES SECONDS
Snap a photo each morning. Our guided camera overlay ensures consistent lighting and framing so every scan is comparable. The app measures inflammation, pigmentation, and texture indices, then translates them into five intuitive signal scores: Structure, Hydration, Inflammation, Sun Damage, and Elasticity.

SEE YOUR SKIN STORY UNFOLD
Watch trend lines evolve over days, weeks, and months. Interactive charts show how each signal responds to product changes, sunscreen adherence, sleep quality, and hormonal cycles. Animated gauges and sparkline tiles make complex data instantly readable.

PERSONALIZED PRODUCT INTELLIGENCE
Scan any product barcode or search by name. RadianceIQ cross-references 45+ active ingredients against your skin profile and current concerns to generate a personalized effectiveness score. Know exactly which products are working -- and which ones are not worth the shelf space.

CLINICIAN-READY REPORTS
Generate professional PDF exports that summarize your trend data, representative photos, product history, and context overlays (sunscreen use, sleep, cycle tracking) into a format your dermatologist can actually use. Bridge the gap between daily self-care and clinical conversations.

SMART ONBOARDING
Tell RadianceIQ your age range, primary concern, and target scan region. The app tailors its scoring weights, recommendations, and product intelligence to your specific goals -- whether that is clearing acne, reversing sun damage, or monitoring skin aging.

PRIVACY BY DESIGN
Your skin photos and health data stay on your device. RadianceIQ uses local-first storage with optional encrypted cloud sync. We never sell your data, never train on your photos, and never share your information with third parties. Period.

BUILT FOR REAL PEOPLE
- Deterministic scoring algorithms (no random fluctuation)
- Works offline after initial setup
- Supports Apple Sign-In, Google Sign-In, and email authentication
- Dark mode interface designed for low-light morning routines
- Haptic feedback for a premium, tactile experience
- Accessibility-conscious design with clear contrast ratios

WHAT YOU GET
- Unlimited daily skin scans with guided camera
- 5 signal dimensions with animated trend visualizations
- Barcode-based product scanning with ingredient analysis
- Personalized product effectiveness scores
- Clinician-ready report generation with representative photos
- Sunscreen adherence tracking
- Optional sleep and cycle context integration
- Streak tracking to build consistent habits

RadianceIQ was built by a team of engineers and medical professionals who believe that better skin health starts with better data. Download today and start understanding your skin like never before.

screens: Results with score tiles and facial mesh
